arts.ttl: Guus Hiddink explains how Ten Hag ended up “on an island” at Manchester United – Two big mistakes made
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag’s major mistake at Manchester United was putting himself on an island surrounded by his own people, while his manner is press conferences was no help either. That’s according to Guus Hiddink, via Voetbal Primeur, who has admitted he saw problems with Ten Hag’s approach to the Manchester United job.
